## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
```bash
# Steps to reproduce the behavior
pkgdrop ...
```

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Arch Linux, EndeavourOS]
- pkgdrop version: [e.g. 2.0.0]
- Shell: [e.g. bash, zsh]
- Terminal: [e.g. Konsole, GNOME Terminal]

## Additional context
Add any other context, error output, or screenshots.
